question_text:
Product of Array Except Self

Return an array $res$ where $res[i]$ is the product of all elements of $nums$ except $nums[i]$, in $O(n)$ time and without using division.
explanation: Create two passes: first pass calculates prefix products (product of all elements to the left), second pass calculates suffix products (product of elements to the right) and multiplies them into the prefix results.
answer:
def productExceptSelf(nums):
    n = len(nums)
    res = [1] * n
    l, r = 1, 1
    for i in range(n):
        res[i] = l
        l *= nums[i]
    for i in range(n-1, -1, -1):
        res[i] *= r
        r *= nums[i]
    return res
